Converts sensor data to a formatted string representation

Converts sensor data to a formatted string representation Uses the getter methods to ensure protocol.read() is called

Abstract method to convert sensor data to a string representation Must be implemented by concrete sensor classes

Converts sensor data to a formatted string representation
data2String() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Sensor.TempSensor.DHT11
Converts sensor data to a formatted string representation

Port - Class in HWSystem.Devices.Ports
Represents a hardware port that connects devices using specific protocols and maintains a log of port activities.
Port(Protocol, Device, boolean, int, String) - Constructor for class HWSystem.Devices.Ports.Port
Constructor for creating a new port
printData(String) - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Display.Display
Abstract method to print data on the display Must be implemented by concrete display classes
printData(String) - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Display.LCD
Implements the printData method for LCD displays Prints the provided data to the system output
printData(String) - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Display.OLED
Implements the printData method for OLED displays Prints the provided data to the system output
protocol - Variable in class HWSystem.Devices.Device
The communication protocol used by this device.
protocol - Variable in class HWSystem.Devices.Ports.Port
Protocol used by this port for communication
Protocol - Interface in HWSystem.Protocols
Interface defining the standard communication protocol methods.

R

read() - Method in class HWSystem.Protocols.I2C
Reads data using the I2C protocol
read() - Method in class HWSystem.Protocols.OneWire
Reads data using the OneWire protocol
read() - Method in interface HWSystem.Protocols.Protocol
Reads data using the protocol
read() - Method in class HWSystem.Protocols.SPI
Reads data using the SPI protocol
read() - Method in class HWSystem.Protocols.UART
Reads data using the UART protocol
recvData() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.WirelessIO.Bluetooth
Receives data through the Bluetooth connection Uses the underlying protocol to read incoming data
recvData() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.WirelessIO.Wifi
Receives data through the WiFi connection Uses the underlying protocol to read incoming data
recvData() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.WirelessIO.WirelessIO
Abstract method to receive data through the wireless connection Must be implemented by concrete wireless I/O classes
RunSystem(String, String) - Method in class HWSystem.EmbeddedSystem.SystemManager
Initializes and runs the embedded system based on configuration file.

S

sendData(String) - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.WirelessIO.Bluetooth
Sends data through the Bluetooth connection Uses the underlying protocol to write data and prints a confirmation message
sendData(String) - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.WirelessIO.Wifi
Sends data through the WiFi connection Uses the underlying protocol to write data and prints a confirmation message
sendData(String) - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.WirelessIO.WirelessIO
Abstract method to send data through the wireless connection Must be implemented by concrete wireless I/O classes

turnOff() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Device
Abstract method to turn off the device.
turnOff() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Display.LCD
Turns off the LCD display Sets the device state to OFF
turnOff() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Display.OLED
Turns off the OLED display Sets the device state to OFF
turnOff() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.MotorDriver.PCA9685
Turns off the motor driver Sets the device state to OFF
turnOff() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.MotorDriver.SparkFunMD
Turns off the motor driver Sets the device state to OFF
turnOff() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Sensor.IMUSensor.GY_951
Turns off the sensor Sets the device state to OFF
turnOff() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Sensor.IMUSensor.MPU6050
Turns off the sensor Sets the device state to OFF
turnOff() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Sensor.TempSensor.BME280
Turns off the sensor Sets the device state to OFF
turnOff() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Sensor.TempSensor.DHT11
Turns off the sensor Sets the device state to OFF
turnOff() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.WirelessIO.Bluetooth
Turns off the Bluetooth device Sets the device state to OFF
turnOff() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.WirelessIO.Wifi
Turns off the WiFi device Sets the device state to OFF
turnOn() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Device
Abstract method to turn on the device.
turnOn() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Display.LCD
Turns on the LCD display Sets the device state to ON
turnOn() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Display.OLED
Turns on the OLED display Sets the device state to ON
turnOn() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.MotorDriver.PCA9685
Turns on the motor driver Sets the device state to ON
turnOn() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.MotorDriver.SparkFunMD
Turns on the motor driver Sets the device state to ON
turnOn() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Sensor.IMUSensor.GY_951
Turns on the sensor Sets the device state to ON
turnOn() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Sensor.IMUSensor.MPU6050
Turns on the sensor Sets the device state to ON
turnOn() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Sensor.TempSensor.BME280
Turns on the sensor Sets the device state to ON
turnOn() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Sensor.TempSensor.DHT11
Turns on the sensor Sets the device state to ON
turnOn() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.WirelessIO.Bluetooth
Turns on the Bluetooth device Sets the device state to ON
turnOn() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.WirelessIO.Wifi
Turns on the WiFi device Sets the device state to ON

writeLogsToFile() - Method in class HWSystem.Devices.Ports.Port
Writes all accumulated log records to the log file and clears the log records stack

Adds a new log entry to the log records stack
